ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "handle" TEXT /* Handle of the user (e.g., @mdo) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date when the user signed up */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the profile belongs to */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "header_image" TEXT /* Header image of the user */,
  "birthday" TEXT /* Birthday of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., post, comment, like) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was performed */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content related to the activity (e.g., post text, comment text) */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "engagement_count" INTEGER /* Number of engagements (e.g., likes, comments) for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "follower_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date when the follow was initiated */,
  "follow_status" TEXT /* Status of the follow (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_followers_follower_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "following" (
  "following_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each following */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "following_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date when the follow was initiated */,
  "follow_status" TEXT /* Status of the follow (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("following_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_following_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_following_following_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("following_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_tags" (
  "content_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content tag */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "tag_date" TEXT /* Date when the tag was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_tags_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., mention, like, comment) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., post, comment, like) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was performed */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocked_users" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who blocked another user */,
  "blocked_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was blocked */,
  "block_date" TEXT /* Date when the block was initiated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocked_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocked_users_blocked_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("blocked_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reported_users" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported another user */,
  "reported_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was initiated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reported_users_reported_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("reported_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reported_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
